'''Baz Korral''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who had been a prisoner in the spice mines of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

==Biography==
While serving time on Kessel, [[Booster Terrik]] saved his life, and when they were both released from the penal colony, he began to work for Terrik. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Terrik assigned Korral and several of his [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] companions to watch over his daughter, [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax]], while she and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] were investigating [[Wooter, Rimki, and Vass, Attorneys at Law]] on [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] in an effort to track down the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' prisoners. The arrangement proved to be advantageous when the two women ran afoul of several of [[Ysanne Isard]]'s [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agents. The Verpine tracked the pair as they were being escorted into a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]], and Korral was able to provide a distraction—as well as weapons—for them. The ensuing lightfight saw the elimination of the Imperials.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
